languages.text: "Ваш приказ ясен. Надеюсь, им хватит сил достаточно долго сдерживать ярость и жажду мщения при виде богопротивных ксеносов".
"Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."
languages.original_text: "Ваш приказ ясен. Надеюсь, им хватит сил достаточно долго сдерживать ярость и жажду мщения при виде богопротивных ксеносов".

traits.locale_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."
"Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."
"Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

languages.text: 「あなたの命令は明らかです。神に呪われた異種族の姿を見て、怒りと復讐の渇望を飲み込むだけの強さがあることを願っています」
languages.original_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの命令は明らかです。神に呪われた異種族の姿を見て、怒りと復讐の渇望を飲み込むだけの強さがあることを願っています。」

languages.text: «Sus órdenes quedan claras. Esperemos que sean lo bastante fuertes como para contener su ira y su sed de venganza ante los blasfemos xenos».
languages.original_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

traits.locale_text: «Sus órdenes quedan claras. Esperemos que sean lo bastante fuertes como para contener su ira y su sed de venganza ante los blasfemos xenos».

languages.text: “指令很明确。但愿他们亲眼看见那些被神皇诅咒的异形时，还能按捺得住复仇的渴望。”
languages.original_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

traits.locale_text: “指令很明确。但愿他们亲眼看见那些被神皇诅咒的异形时，还能按捺得住复仇的渴望。”

languages.text: "Eure Befehle sind eindeutig. Ich hoffe, sie sind stark genug, ihre Wut und ihren Wunsch nach Vergeltung im Angesicht dieser gottverfluchten Xenos lange genug zu zügeln."
languages.original_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Eure Befehle sind eindeutig. Ich hoffe, sie sind stark genug, ihre Wut und ihren Wunsch nach Vergeltung im Angesicht dieser gottverfluchten Xenos lange genug zu zügeln."

languages.text: "Emirler açık. Umarım o Tanrı'nın lanetlediği zenoları görünce öfkelerini ve intikam arzularını yeterince yutacak kadar güçlüdürler."
languages.original_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

traits.locale_text: "Emirler açık. Umarım o Tanrı'nın lanetlediği zenoları görünce öfkelerini ve intikam arzularını yeterince yutacak kadar güçlüdürler."

languages.text: « Vos ordres sont clairs. J'espère qu'ils auront la force de ravaler leur colère et leur soif de vengeance assez longtemps à la vue de ces maudits xénos. »
languages.original_text: "Your orders are clear. I hope they are strong enough to swallow their rage and thirst for vengeance long enough at the sight of those God-cursed xenos."

traits.locale_text: « Vos ordres sont clairs. J'espère qu'ils auront la force de ravaler leur colère et leur soif de vengeance assez longtemps à la vue de ces maudits xénos. »
